caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "I DON'T NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a black professional microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a studio or store, with a wall of framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt visible in the background. To the right, racks of colorful clothing are partially visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left that says "THE SHORE" and a red and white logo on the right that says "RED VELVET". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, slightly shifting his facial expression and head position while remaining focused on the microphone. The background and equipment remain static throughout the sequence.
